news.title: A ‘Double Whammy’ For India: How War And El Niño Could Ignite A New Inflationary Fire
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the combined impact of geopolitical supply shocks and climate-driven food price volatility on Indian CPI.
news.why_it_matters: Explains the specific transmission channels through which global energy prices and domestic weather patterns threaten India's inflation targets.

news.title: Datanomics: India's energy diversification timely, but risks remain
news.india_relevance: Examines India's long-term strategy to reduce dependence on specific energy sources amidst global volatility.
news.why_it_matters: Provides a data-driven look at how India's energy mix is evolving and where the structural vulnerabilities still lie.

news.title: As the West Asian crisis prolongs, how is India placed on the natural gas front?
news.india_relevance: Assesses India's natural gas supply security and price sensitivity to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.
news.why_it_matters: Breaks down the impact on fertilizer and power sectors, which are heavily dependent on imported LNG.

news.title: Bad bank framework set for overhaul with NARCL-IDRCL merger
news.india_relevance: A major structural shift in how India's stressed assets are managed and resolved by state-backed entities.
news.why_it_matters: The merger aims to fix the slow resolution process of the 'bad bank' experiment, impacting the banking sector's balance sheet health.

news.title: Bajaj’s CNG bet falters as ecosystem gaps widen - The Financial Express
news.india_relevance: Highlights the infrastructure challenges facing India's push for alternative fuel vehicles in the mass-market segment.
news.why_it_matters: Shows the disconnect between product innovation and the necessary refueling infrastructure in the Indian automotive sector.

news.title: India is launching cheap weight-loss drugs — but Novo Nordisk is betting its brands will stay on top
news.india_relevance: Discusses the entry of Indian pharma into the high-growth GLP-1 market and the competition with global giants.
news.why_it_matters: Reflects a shift in the Indian pharma model from generic manufacturing to competing in high-value, lifestyle-disease segments.

news.title: Quick help, quicker price cuts: Discounts drive demand, but unit economics remain unresolved - The Financial Express
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the sustainability of the quick-commerce boom currently disrupting Indian retail.
news.why_it_matters: Questions the long-term viability of the high-burn model that is fundamentally changing Indian consumer behavior.

news.title: BoB system error inflates EMIs, hits borrower scores
news.india_relevance: A significant governance and technical failure at a major Indian public sector bank affecting retail borrowers.
news.why_it_matters: Highlights the systemic risks posed by banking technology failures on individual credit health and institutional trust.

news.title: BOT snub: Rs 22,000 crore highway projects fail to attract bids
news.india_relevance: Reflects private sector hesitation in India's Build-Operate-Transfer infrastructure model.
news.why_it_matters: Indicates a potential slowdown in private infrastructure investment despite government push, requiring a model rethink.

news.title: Net FDI negative for fifth straight month in January 2026 as outflows exceed inflows by $1.4 billion
news.india_relevance: A critical macro trend showing a reversal in foreign direct investment flows into India.
news.why_it_matters: Persistent negative FDI signals a shift in global investor sentiment or increased repatriation by multinational corporations.

news.title: Large private companies see no growth in capex in FY27, shows government survey
news.india_relevance: A leading indicator of the private investment cycle in the Indian economy.
news.why_it_matters: Stagnant capex plans suggest a lack of confidence in demand growth, potentially slowing India's long-term GDP trajectory.

news.title: India’s reward points economy pivots to everyday spending
news.india_relevance: Tracks the evolution of consumer loyalty and credit card usage patterns among Indians.
news.why_it_matters: Shows how digital payments and credit are becoming integrated into the daily consumption habits of the Indian middle class.

news.title: Farm exporters take costly detours as Middle East conflict disrupts trade
news.india_relevance: Direct impact of West Asian geopolitics on India's agricultural export competitiveness.
news.why_it_matters: Increased freight costs and transit times are hurting the margins of Indian farmers and exporters.

news.title: Input costs may deny exporters edge gained from rupee at record low. Textiles, leather, agro products, carpets may benefit
news.india_relevance: Explains why a weaker rupee isn't providing the expected boost to Indian manufacturing exports.
news.why_it_matters: Highlights the 'import-intensive' nature of Indian exports where rising raw material costs offset currency advantages.

news.title: Govt ramps up domestic LPG production to 50-60% of demand; two VLGCs to soon deliver 92,613 tonnes
news.india_relevance: A critical update on India's energy security during a period of high import uncertainty.
news.why_it_matters: Shows the government's reactive measures to prevent a domestic fuel crisis amid Middle East supply disruptions.

news.title: India's strategic oil reserves 64% full, may last about 5 days: Junior petroleum minister Suresh Gopi
news.india_relevance: Reveals the current state of India's emergency energy buffers.
news.why_it_matters: The low duration of reserves highlights a major strategic vulnerability for India during prolonged global conflicts.

news.title: Corporate Laws Amendment Bill mandates loan registers by lending, investment firms, decriminalises Sec 186 breaches
news.india_relevance: Significant changes to the Companies Act affecting corporate governance and compliance for Indian firms.
news.why_it_matters: Balances stricter monitoring of inter-corporate loans with the decriminalization of technical procedural lapses.

news.title: AI servers drive policy rethink on PLI scheme - The Financial Express
news.india_relevance: India's manufacturing policy is being updated to include high-end computing hardware.
news.why_it_matters: Reflects the government's intent to capture the AI infrastructure value chain under the 'Make in India' umbrella.

news.title: SEBI removes automatic disqualification triggers in revised ‘fit and proper’ norms
news.india_relevance: A major regulatory shift in how SEBI evaluates the eligibility of market intermediaries and directors.
news.why_it_matters: Moves away from rigid rules to a more nuanced evaluation, potentially easing the path for professionals in the financial sector.

news.title: India, Russia reaffirm $100 billion trade goal as West Asia simmers
news.india_relevance: Updates the status of India's strategic economic pivot toward Russia for energy and trade.
news.why_it_matters: The ambitious trade target signals a long-term commitment to a non-Western trade corridor despite global sanctions.

news.title: Government introduces bill to amend companies, LLP laws; proposes changes in CSR norms
news.india_relevance: New legislative changes affecting the operational flexibility of Indian businesses and LLPs.
news.why_it_matters: Changes in CSR norms can significantly impact how Indian corporates allocate their mandatory social spending.

news.title: SEBI revamps framework on conflict of interest, enhances ease of doing business

youtube.india_relevance: Directly addresses the structural mismatch between India's higher education output and actual formal job creation.

youtube.title: New income-tax rules 2026 notified: What changes for your salary, HRA, EV perks and compliance
youtube.india_relevance: Directly impacts the disposable income and tax planning of India's salaried middle class.
youtube.why_it_matters:

youtube.title: Indian Manufacturing About to Explode? New Free Trade Agreements Explained.
youtube.india_relevance: Analyzes how India's shifting trade policy and new FTAs are designed to integrate Indian firms into global supply chains.
youtube.why_it_matters:
FTAs are the primary tool for India to compete with Vietnam and Thailand for 'China Plus One' manufacturing shifts.
Understanding these agreements is crucial for identifying which sectors will gain export competitiveness.

youtube.title: The Gulf Shock: How Will It Impact India?
youtube.india_relevance: Connects Middle Eastern geopolitical volatility to India's energy security and remittance flows.
youtube.why_it_matters:
India's fiscal deficit and inflation targets are highly sensitive to crude oil price shocks originating in the Gulf.

youtube.title: Govt wants Aadhaar on every phone, but why are tech firms opposing it?
youtube.india_relevance: Highlights the tension between India's national security/identity goals and the operational autonomy of global tech hardware firms.

youtube.india_relevance: Analyzes Apple's strategy to capture a share of India's massive UPI-led digital payments ecosystem.
youtube.why_it_matters:

youtube.title: What Went Wrong With IDBI's Privatisation? | Markets Today #185 | Upstox
youtube.india_relevance: Examines the hurdles in India's banking disinvestment program and the complexities of selling state-owned assets.
youtube.why_it_matters:
The failure or delay of IDBI's sale reflects broader governance and regulatory challenges in privatizing public sector banks.
It impacts the government's disinvestment targets and the long-term health of the banking sector.

youtube.title: Is AI About To Destroy Indian IT Jobs? | Markets Today #184 | Upstox
youtube.india_relevance: Explores the existential threat posed by generative AI to India's $250 billion IT services export industry.
youtube.why_it_matters:
Indian IT is the largest private-sector employer; a shift toward AI-driven automation could lead to massive wage stagnation or job losses.
Companies must pivot from 'manpower-linked' revenue to 'IP-linked' models to survive.

youtube.title: South India’s Office Boom! What’s Driving Leasing In Bengaluru, Hyderabad & Chennai? | Business News
youtube.india_relevance: Identifies the drivers behind commercial real estate growth in India's primary tech hubs.
youtube.why_it_matters:
